title: #amytangerine
excerpt: WOW! There are over 18,000 posts under the hashtag, #amytangerine on Instagram . Keep up the amazing and impressive work. Also, if you're sharing stuff on other social media that you want to see, like YouTube videos - let me…
body:
WOW! There are over 18,000 posts under the hashtag, #amytangerine on Instagram. Keep up the amazing and impressive work. Also, if you're sharing stuff on other social media that you want to see, like YouTube videos - let me know in the comments below and I will make a link round up! You can find many of these products in your local scrapbook stores or online - at Simon Says Stamp | Blue Moon Scrapbooking | Scrapbook.com 

1. @dearlydee // 2.  @iddypop // 3. @jenchapin // 4. @nancydamiano // 5. @goodthingscollected // 6. @violeta_scrap // 7. @livelifeandcreate // 8. @ojosdepapel // 9. @sita_belen
